summary: Implementation review accepts refs-only writable target, form state, sensitive export policy, and no-submit runtime guard facts for Harbor #137/#138/#139/#140.
reviewed_validation_summary: pnpm typecheck; pnpm test; pnpm smoke:runtime; git diff --check; loom suite validate/evidence/carrier; loom fact-chain; loom verify passed locally before review artifact commit.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation returns target/form/guard facts as refs and public state only, without raw values, cookies, tokens, raw DOM/network, profile storage, or real submit behavior.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Typecheck, tests, and smoke cover writable target refs, sensitive field export policy, active no-submit guard facts, and private material exclusion.
